speaker: speaker1
text: I was surprised to see how few people you have on-site . You provide a wide range of goods and services but have a very small workforce .

speaker: speaker2
text: It depends on the time of year . At peak times we hire in casual workers to help with packing and dispatch . We also contract out certain services all year round , for example , cleaning . We run a very tight operation !

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you handle the recruiting yourselves ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Sometimes we use a local employment agency . It depends on the job .
